Hero.description: Your Partner for World-Class Sports Facility Development.

gymEquipment.title: Gym Equipment
gymEquipment.description: Professional-grade gym equipment for institutional and commercial facilities, from strength training to full cardio systems.

outdoorFitness.title: Outdoor Fitness
outdoorFitness.description: Purpose-built outdoor fitness installations for parks, schools, and community facilities — designed for durability and daily use.

gymnasticsEquipment.title: Gymnastics Equipment
gymnasticsEquipment.description: Certified gymnastics apparatus for training centres and competition venues, supplied and installed to international standards.

AboutCompany.title: SK. Sport Trading CO.,LTD.
AboutCompany.detail: SK Sport Trading Co., Ltd. is Thailand's trusted partner in professional sports facility development. We specialize in the supply, installation, and maintenance of world-class gym and fitness equipment for institutional, commercial, and public-sector clients across the region.

ContactSection.title2: specialists to find your perfect fit.
